texts.text: A). Children 4years and below sharing with adults are free of charge

texts.text: B). Children 5years and below 12 years sharing with 2 adults pays 50% of half Double/ Twin.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: C). A child sharing with 1 adult in a room pays 50% of adult rate.
texts.text: C). A child sharing with 1 adult in a room pays 50% of adult rate.

texts.label: list_item

texts.text: D). Children staying occupying own room will pay 85% of what the adults pay
